title: Renewed supply risks pushes copper higher
section_path: Renewed supply risks pushes copper higher
section_path_text: Renewed supply risks pushes copper higher
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Weaker US dollar and renewed supply issues pushed commodity ex-energy prices higher. Energy complex was under pressure from ample supplies. Strong demand from new energy sector and renewed supply issues pushed copper prices towards USD8,500/t.
